g[14][0X4]=(g[0X19][0x3])-(0x30212ff) g[0x19][0X4]=(g[0X14])-(0x43e523e) g[1]=(g[0X3])-(63597813) local s=[==[:paJGd*s`⁠O@hB*]B(lh#]==]g[0xb][0X3]=(g[0x6])-(0X148bc0d) g[0x19][0X1]=(g[0XE][0x3])-(0x5d5a1fc) g[0X17]=(g[0Xe][0X2])-(0x2146274) local function t(u) local v={} u=d(u,"\026","") u=d(u,a(g[0x1],g[0XB][0X5],g[0XE][0x1]),"") u=d(u,a(g[0x1],g[0XB][0x5],0x8c),"") u=d(u,a(g[0X1],0x81,g[0xE][0X5]),"") u=d(u,a(0Xef,0XBB,0Xbf),"") local w={} local x=0X1 for y=0X1,#u do local z=e(u,y) if z>=0X21 and z<=g[25][0X1] then w[x]=a(z) x+=0X1 end end u=f(w) local ba=#u local bb=0X1 local bc=1 while bb<=ba do local bd=bb+g[0Xe][0x4] local be=(bd<=ba) and g[0X19][0x7] or(ba-bb+0X1) if be==0x0 then break end local bf,bg,bh,bi,bj=e(u,bb,bd) bg=bg or g[0x19][1];bh=if not(not bh) then bh else g[0X19][0X1];bi=if bi then bi else g[0X19][0X1];bj=bj or g[0x19][0X1] local bk=((((bf-0X21)*g[0X19][0x2]+(bg-0x21))*g[0x19][0X2]+(bh-0x21))*g[0X19][0X2]+(bi-33))*g[25][0X2]+(bj-0X21) local bl=bk//0x1000000%g[0xb][0x3] local bm=bk//g[0x19][0X4]%g[0xB][0x3] local bn=bk//g[11][0X3]%g[0xB][3] local bo=bk%g[11][3] local bp=a(bl,bm,bn,bo) if be<g[0X19][0x7] then bp=c(bp,0x1,be-0X1) end v[bc]=bp bc+=0x1 bb+=g[0X19][0x7] end return f(v) end g[0X4][0x6]=(g[0x15])-(0X420c4e) g[0Xb][0X4]=(g[0x4][0x4])-(0X1c38d10) local function bq(br,bs) local bt={} local bu=#bs for bv=0X1,#br do local bw=((bv-1)%bu)+1 bt[bv]=a((e(br,bv)-e(bs,bw))%g[0xB][3]) end return f(bt) end g[0X4][0x3]=(g[0xF])-(0x185A505) g[0XB][0x2]=(g[21])-(0x420BD3) local function bx(by) local bz=e(by,0x1) if bz==0 then return c(by,g[0x4][6]) end local ca={} local cb=0X1 local cc=g[0X4][0x6] local cd=#by while cc<=cd do local ce=e(by,cc) cc+=0X1 if ce<g[0xb][0X5] then local cf=ce+0x1 for cg=0X0,cf-1 do ca[cb]=c(by,cc+cg,cc+cg) cb+=0x1 end cc+=cf elseif ce<0XC0 then local ch=ce-g[11][0X2] local ci=e(by,cc) cc+=0x1 local cj=cb-ci for ck=0X0,ch-0X1 do ca[cb]=ca[cj+ck] cb+=0X1 end elseif ce<g[0X4][0X3] then local cl=ce-0Xbc local cm=e(by,cc)*g[0XB][3]+e(by,cc+1) cc+=g[0x4][0X6] local cn=cb-cm for co=0X0,cl-0x1 do ca[cb]=ca[cn+co] cb+=0X1 end elseif ce==g[0X4][0X3] then local cp=e(by,cc)+0x24 local cq=e(by,cc+0X1)*g[11][0X3]+e(by,cc+g[0X4][0X6]) cc+=g[23] local cr=cb-cq for cs=0x0,cp-0X1 do ca[cb]=ca[cr+cs] cb+=0x1 end else local ct=e(by,cc)+g[0Xe][0X4] local cu=c(by,cc+0X1,cc+0X1) cc+=g[0X4][0x6] for cv=0X0,ct-0x1 do ca[cb]=cu cb+=0X1 end end end return f(ca) end g[0X4][0x2]=(g[0x19][0X8])-(0x39ccaff) g[0x4][0X7]=(g[0Xb][0x7])-(0x3A89879) local cw=bx(bq(t(r),t(s))) g[0Xe][0X6]=(g[0x15])-(0x420C3B) if e(cw,0x1)~=g[0xE][6] or e(cw,g[0X4][0X6])~=g[0xB][0X4] or e(cw,g[23])~=g[0x4][0x2] or e(cw,g[0xe][0x4])~=g[4][0X7] then while true do end end local
